title: Mobius Optimization (Möbius Pack)
description: This modpack aims to get the maximum quantity of FPS possible, this modpack doesn't contain any QoL mods, only Normal and Agressive Optimization Mods
body:
![Mobius Pack](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3jL1NR2q/images/a91b51252b82df1a31985ac8f7ed1622569dc472.png)
The Best Modpack for Performance
for [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net 'Fabric Loader Website')
--- This modpack aims to maximize Minecraft Java performance using normal and aggressive performance mods, this modpack only haves optimization mods (Does not include quality of life mods). Even though Mod Menu is considered a QoL mod, i am including it since it is necessary to configure certain mods Disclaimer: this Modpack uses the [Methane](https://modrinth.com/mod/methane) mod which completely eliminates lighting from the game, you can remove it from the mods folder if you don't like it ---
Mods List (Alphabetical Order)
Showing 29 Mods (2 Deleted Mods)
- [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [FeyTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/feytweaks/) - [~~Force Close World Loading Screen~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcecloseworldloadingscreen) Replaced by Debugify - [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - [Methane](https://modrinth.com/mod/methane) - [Midnight Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [~~Starlight~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) Replaced by Methane - [Tape Stop](https://modrinth.com/mod/tape-stop) - [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) - [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) - [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
---
